Id1.text: From Spain, Ajoblanco (alternatively known as Ajo blanco) has bread as an ingredient.

Id2.text: Ajoblanco, also known as "Ajo blanco", comes from Spain. Bread is one of the ingredients.

Id3.text: Bread is an ingredient of Ajoblanco, which is from Spain and an alternative name to Ajo blanco.
